name: Active
description: Is a player using an active ability during the night.

name: Appear
description: Make as aspect of a player appear as something else.

name: Assume
description: Change your role to another player's role.

name: Attack
description: Eliminate a player from the game.

name: Bleed
description: Announced that a player is bleeding, they are then eliminated during the following night.

name: Capability
description: What a player is capable of when taking all of their abilities into account.

name: Class
description: A role's responsibilities they have for for their faction.

name: Convert
description: Change a player's faction.

name: Divine Protection
description: Block a single fatal attack or execution during the day or night.

name: Enhance
description: Allow a player to use an ability an additional time during the night.

name: Execute
description: Eliminate a player during the day.

name: Exposed
description: You are instantly executed if you are accused.

name: Faction
description: The team a player is part of.

name: Frail
description: Protections on you during the night have no affect.

name: Guarantee
description: Prevent any manipulations from affecting an ability or target.

name: Heal
description: Reduces the effect of a single elimination ability during the night. Prioritises bleeding, poison and ignite, removing them; otherwise reduces an attack to a bleed.

name: Hemorrhage
description: Announced that a player is bleeding, they are then eliminated during the following night. Cannot be stopped by protection.

name: Ignite
description: Announced that a player is ignited, they are then incinerated during the following night.

name: Incinerate
description: Eliminate a player whilst also denying their role reveal and any 'on death' abilities.

name: Learn
description: Secretly obtain information during the night.

name: Meet
description: Secretly meet with a player during the night.

name: Miss
description: Abilities used on a player will have no effect.

name: Neighbours
description: The closest alive player on each of your sides.

name: Perish
description: Be eliminated from the game.

name: Permanent Defence
description: If you are fated to die during the night, protect yourself.

name: Poison
description: Player learns that they are poisoned, they are then eliminated during the following night.

name: Protect
description: Block all attacks during the night.

name: Redirect
description: Move targets on a player to another player.

name: Remove
description: Remove a player from the game.  Any "on death" abilities to not trigger and their role to not be revealed. Cannot be protected against or manipulated.

name: Reveal
description: Publically reveal information.

name: Role
description: A player's current role.

name: Share
description: Share targets on one player to another player.

name: Share Fate
description: Perish if the player you are sharing fate with dies.

name: Targets
description: The players that a player is using their active abilities on during the night.

name: Transform
description: Change a player's role to another role.

name: Unstoppable Attack
description: Eliminate a player from the game. Cannot be stopped by protection.

name: Untargetable
description: All targets on a player during the night will miss.
